qualification_model.points_per_win: 4 pts (standard win) or 5 pts (win by big margin — bonus point)
qualification_model.note: Bonus-point win over Jersey Aces (chased 69 in 5.4 overs, bowled them out for 68) lifts WW to 4th in Group C with 39 pts, NRR +1.2518. The 8th-place cutoff is Saffron Sapphire at 33 pts — WW leads by 6 points, which equals 1.5 standard wins of breathing room. Four clear must-win fixtures remain (Monroe Giants, Top Guns, Firehawks, EB Strikers); Sinclair Lions on 07/19 is a swing game that must be treated as a must-win. The three upset games (Pway Cubs, Giant Slayers, NJ Marvels) are long shots but any win there is a gift. Priority: win every beatable game with big margins to stack bonus points and maximise NRR — a top-2 Group C finish means a direct Final spot.

briefing: Waterfront Warriors are 4th in Group C with 39 points from 11 games (8W/3L), NRR +1.2518. The bonus-point demolition of Jersey Aces — bowled out for 68 in 15 overs and chased down in 5.4 overs — lifted WW 5 places from 5th to 4th. The playoff cutoff is 8th place (Saffron Sapphire, 33 pts); WW leads by 6 points with 9 games left. The points system awards 4 pts for a standard win and 5 pts for a big-margin win (bonus point). With 4 clear must-wins and a swing game coming up immediately (Sinclair Lions, 07/19), WW controls their playoff destiny. Winning every beatable game by large margins is the path to not just qualifying but finishing top 2 for a direct shot at the Final.
